content:
🚀 I built PasteDB — a modern platform for sharing text, code, and images with a focus on speed, privacy, and developer experience.

Some of its key features:

✨ End-to-End Encrypted pastes (client-side encryption)

📝 Syntax highlighting for many programming languages

🖼️ Image uploads and sharing

🔒 Public, Unlisted, Private, and Password-Protected pastes

⚡ Instant sharing with custom URLs

👤 Google Sign-In and personal dashboard

🔍 Explore page to discover public pastes

🧑‍💻 API for creating and managing pastes programmatically

💻 VS Code Extension for uploading snippets directly from the editor

▶️ Run code directly in the browser (powered by Judge0)

📱 Responsive design that works on desktop and mobile

I'm continuously improving the project and would love your feedback.

What features would you like to see in a modern paste-sharing platform?

🔗 https://pastedb.netlify.app
